name: Standards
description: ACLU Wins Higher Legal Standards for Gang Injunctions; Innocent Protected From Arbitrary Restrictions ACLU Wins Higher Legal Standards for Gang Injunctions; Innocent Protected From Arbitrary Restrictions FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Thursday, May 10, 2001 SAN DIEGO — The California Court of Appeal ruled today that prosecutors must first prove through clear and convincing evidence that a young man is a gang member before using an anti-gang injunction to restrict his right to engage in everyday act.
